text.title: seo-techniques Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for seo-techniques as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Multiple pages targeting the same primary keyword (e.g., three different pages about "SDD methodology").
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Cannibalization splits link equity and authority across multiple pages, weakening all of them. Google chooses which page to rank and often picks the wrong one.
